name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new cleanup category, heuristic, or safety check
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's missing

<!-- What cleanup category, tool, or scenario does upkeep not currently handle? -->

## What would you want it to do

<!-- What should the skill find, ask about, or clean? -->

## Where does the data live

<!-- File paths, directories, or commands that would identify the target. If you've reclaimed space here manually before, paste what you ran. -->

## Safety considerations

<!-- Is there anything that could go wrong? E.g., app that looks orphaned but has background service, config that looks unused but gates on rare env var. -->

## Which mode(s) should this run in

- [ ] Deep (full audit + cleanup)
- [ ] Quick (routine sweep)
- [ ] Audit (report only)
